# GSA .gov Domain List — Data Agreement

## Provider
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA), General Services Administration (GSA)

## URL
https://github.com/cisagov/dotgov-data

## Terms of Service URL
https://github.com/cisagov/dotgov-data/blob/main/LICENSE (CC0 dedication)

## License
CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)

## Data We Collect
Complete list of registered .gov domains including organization name, domain type (Federal, State, City, County, Tribal), agency, and registration status. Downloaded from the cisagov/dotgov-data GitHub repository.

## How We Use It
Authoritative .gov domain list in DRM3's internet telemetry index. Used to identify and tag government domains, validate domain ownership, and distinguish government entities from private organizations in domain intelligence profiles.

## Commercial Use
Yes. CC0 explicitly dedicates the work to the public domain. No restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. CC0 permits unrestricted redistribution in any form, modified or unmodified.

## Attribution Required
No. CC0 explicitly waives all attribution requirements. Best practice: cite "CISA dotgov-data" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
None. Data is a static file in a GitHub repository. Download frequency should match update cadence (updated periodically, not daily).

## Key Restrictions
- No restrictions whatsoever (CC0)
- Do not misrepresent domain ownership or registration status

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
